pr.title: feat(tms): add opt-in agent automation settings (HL-382)
pr.body: ## Summary Adds opt-in TMS agent automation settings at organization, project, and provider credential scope. Resolves effective settings with safe defaults and wires low-risk automated actions into the existing agent run pipeline. ## Changes - New `tms_agent_automation_settings` table and migration `0020_cuddly_spectrum.sql` - Settings model with defaults: - `autoRunQaOnSyncedJobs`: false - `autoDraftTranslations`: disabled, empty locales - `writeBack.requireManualApproval`: true - `writeBack.autoWriteBackEnabled`: false - REST API under `/orgs/:slug/tms-agent-automation` for org, project, and provider scopes - Job sync triggers optional auto QA and auto-draft translation agent runs for newly synced jobs - Proposal review can optionally enqueue auto write-back when explicitly enabled in settings - Unit tests for default-safe behavior and validation rules ## Acceptance criteria - [x] Automation settings stored per organization / project / provider - [x] Manual approval remains default for provider write-back - [x] Auto write-back disabled unless explicitly enabled - [x] Tests cover default-safe behavior Closes HL-382 Linear Issue: [HL-382](https://linear.app/hyperlocalise/issue/HL-382/add-automation-rules-for-low-risk-tms-agent-actions)
pr.author: cungminh2710
